text: Filing in pandas-dev/pandas: when I run pd.read_csv against data/sample.csv, the requests package raises ConnectionError on a redirect. Stack trace points at src/io/parsers.py.
BUG in acme/widget: numpy.float128 dtype causes ValueError on Windows. See src/widget/core.py line 42 and tests/test_core.py for the failing case.
Question: how do I install pandas extras like pandas[parquet] via pip? Does this also require pyarrow?
Doc update for the README: clarify that the package is licensed under MIT. No code changes.

related: open issue in encode/httpx
ENH: add Series.between_time support for timezone-aware indices in pandas-dev/pandas. Related code lives at pandas/core/indexes/datetimes.py.
Regression on numpy/numpy: np.linalg.inv raises LinAlgError on singular matrices when called with check_finite=False. Repro lives in tests/linalg/test_inv.py.
When running our CI we see a UserWarning from urllib3 and a DeprecationWarning from cryptography. The output is dumped into logs/ci-run.log.
Hi maintainers of psf/requests — sessions raise SSLError on a self-signed cert even with verify=False. See attached src/repro.py.
Hello! Just saying thanks — really enjoying using this library in my side project.
